name: Ares
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Ares is a spark that purifies — Spear; under Mars; in Aries; with XVI The Tower.
flowText: Ares is a spark that purifies — Spear; under Mars; in Aries; with XVI The Tower.

related.name: ♂ Mars
related.teaser: Mars is the blade of fire — spear of will, tower’s flame, the storm of courage.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Hachiman
related.teaser: Hachiman embodies honor, law, single combat — under Mars; in Aries.

related.name: Tyr
related.teaser: Tyr embodies honor, law, single combat — under Mars; in Aries.

related.name: ♈ Aries
related.teaser: Aries is the spear of beginnings — flame of will, thrust of courage, the primal strike.

related.name: Hephaestus
related.teaser: Hephaestus embodies forge, craft, volcano — under Vulcan/Mars; in Capricorn, Aries.

related.name: Vulcan
related.teaser: Vulcan embodies forge, craft, volcano — under Vulcan/Mars; in Capricorn, Aries.

related.name: ᚦ Thurisaz
related.teaser: Thurisaz is the thunder-thorn — the jolt that makes a clear edge.

related.name: Inanna/Ishtar
related.teaser: Inanna/Ishtar embodies love and war paradox — under Venus · Mars; in Aries, Libra.

related.name: ᛏ Tiwaz
related.teaser: Tiwaz is the straight spear — courage disciplined by covenant.

related.name: Red Jasper
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Hematite
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.
